item.title: Has Unifinz Capital India Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Unifinz Capital India Ltd has declared a 5% dividend, amounting to ₹0.5 per share, with an ex-date of April 6, 2026. While recent short-term returns have been negative, the company has shown significant long-term price appreciation and dividend returns. Time: Mar 30 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Ltd is April 14, 2026. Time: Mar 30 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: Markets Rise, But Wework India Management Ltd Slides to All-Time Low Amid Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Wework India Management Ltd’s share price plunged to a new all-time low of Rs.419.6 on 30 March 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s recent performance. Despite a volatile trading session, the stock outperformed its sector but remains under pressure amid a challenging valuation and financial backdrop. Time: Mar 30 2026 07:34 PM IST

item.title: Mayank Cattle Food Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 144.25 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline of 9.84% today dragged Mayank Cattle Food Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 144.25, extending a downward trajectory that has seen the stock lose over 37% in the past year. This fall comes amid broader market weakness but also reflects company-specific pressures that have weighed heavily on investor sentiment. Time: Mar 30 2026 06:10 PM IST

item.title: Fedbank Financial Services Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Fedbank Financial Services Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, raising concerns about the stock's medium to long-term momentum and overall market sentiment. Time: Mar 30 2026 06:10 PM IST

item.title: A B Infrabuild Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: A B Infrabuild Ltd, a micro-cap player in the construction sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a technical pattern where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: Mar 30 2026 06:10 PM IST

item.title: ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend Ahead
item.description: ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: Mar 30 2026 06:10 PM IST

item.title: IDFC First Bank Ltd. Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: IDFC First Bank Ltd., a mid-cap player in the private sector banking industry, has recently formed a Death Cross, a technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock's medium to long-term outlook. Time: Mar 30 2026 06:10 PM IST

item.title: Majestic Auto Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Majestic Auto Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development highlights a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raises concerns about its near- to medium-term outlook amid already subdued performance metrics. Time: Mar 30 2026 06:10 PM IST

item.title: T & I Global Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: T & I Global Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Industrial Manufacturing sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s near- to medium-term outlook. Time: Mar 30 2026 06:10 PM IST

item.title: IIFL Finance Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: IIFL Finance Ltd, a prominent player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has recently formed a Death Cross—a technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, raising concerns about the stock’s near-term momentum and long-term strength despite its recent strong fundamentals and past performance. Time: Mar 30 2026 06:10 PM IST

item.title: Suryavanshi Spinning Mills Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 17.42 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline has pushed Suryavanshi Spinning Mills Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 17.42 on 30 Mar 2026, marking a significant 38.9% drop from its 52-week high of Rs 28.49. This fall comes amid broader market weakness but is notably more severe than sector and benchmark indices, signalling stock-specific pressures. Time: Mar 30 2026 06:10 PM IST

item.title: Gujarat Pipavav Port Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend Ahead
item.description: Gujarat Pipavav Port Ltd (Stock ID: 557740) has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook within the Transport Infrastructure sector. Time: Mar 30 2026 06:10 PM IST
